title: Jewish mod
body:
In this mod:
New blocks, items, buildings, armor.
Jewish trees make the Jewish biome not as empty as it seems, the grayish grass shows how much the Jewish people wanted freedom, and the grayish grass shows the memory of those who died for the war for Israel's independence (there is a block with a Star of David and Menorah to commemorate this).
The new structure of the synagogue demonstrates the Jewish religion of the Jews.
